## Checklist

- [ ] Does not bypass Task / Run / Artifact / Memory / Confirmation primitives
- [ ] No secrets or hardcoded credentials
- [ ] Backend tests pass (`pytest backend/tests`)
- [ ] Example apps still validate (`python scripts/validate_app.py examples/apps/contract-review-agent`)
- [ ] Local demo still works (`bash scripts/verify_local_demo.sh`)
- [ ] Added/updated tests where appropriate
